name: source code analyzer: parserOptions.ecmaFeatures.decorators=true exposes Decorator nodes on classes
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule decorator-trace --parser-options '{"ecmaFeatures":{"decorators":true}}' --in "$PWD/file.ts" 2>out.txt && grep -E 'Decorator name=Component' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
